title: United States Naval Academy
description: Explore the United States Naval Academy: Discover recent news, events, academic programs, and the mission to develop leaders for the Navy and Marine Corps.
text:
Dr. Samara L. Firebaugh
The U.S. Naval Academy announced today that Dr. Samara L. Firebaugh has been selected as the Naval Academy’s Academic Dean and Provost. Firebaugh, who is currently the Naval Academy’s Associate Provost for Academic Affairs, will assume the position in July.
